architecture.summary: Mode detection in SKILL.md routes to agent templates (pm.md, architect.md, researcher.md). Code-reviewer is a standalone skill with parallel reviewer agents. All markdown-based, no runtime architecture.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal skill/plugin markdown files only, no external service integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI skill definitions, no UI involved

performance.summary: N/A - markdown templates and shell script changes, no performance impact

security.summary: N/A - no auth, no data handling, no secrets. Markdown skill definitions only

edge-cases.summary: Mode detection fallback: default to implement mode if intent unclear. Guard script must handle new prefixes (research-*, plan-*) without breaking existing ones
